use_cases: Displaying blog posts or articles in a grid layout on content-heavy websites
News feed items in media and publishing applications
Event or feature highlights with location and date metadata
Portfolio and project showcases with animated hover effects
Content cards in SaaS marketing pages and documentation sites
ai_summary: A polished article card component with entrance animations and interactive hover effects featuring image scaling and elevation. The card displays article metadata including tag, date, title, description, and location in a clean minimalist layout. Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations and uses Lucide icons for visual accents, making it ideal for media sites, blogs, and content-driven platforms.
